response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a senior software developer across multiple domains, including embedded systems (Dlang, C/C++), but lacks direct experience with embedded networking security, Linux kernel modification for security features, or LAN-switch product development. His proficiency in C is strong, but primarily in non-embedded contexts. Native-level Japanese proficiency and direct experience with MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, or Captive Portal are missing. His background in web/mobile development and AI-agent infrastructure does not align closely with the embedded security requirements of the role.
strengths: Strong C programming experience across various domains (e.g., LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments)
Proven ability to work in embedded and systems programming (Dlang, C++)
Demonstrated technical versatility and problem-solving in diverse software projects
concerns: No direct experience with embedded networking security or LAN-switch products
Lacks native-level Japanese proficiency (basic German only)
Limited exposure to required security technologies (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, Captive Portal) or Linux kernel modification for security
